Thought 2: The murder took place inside the mosque, in a room to which only Garry has the keys. Aubrey's actions are centered around the museum and its adjacent cemetery. There is no indication she had access to the locked mosque room. Garry, on the other hand, had the means (keys, sickle expertise), motive (Erika threatening to expose his criminal past), and opportunity (he was the only staff on duty). Aubrey's motive is financial strain, but it's less direct and not tied to a specific threat from Erika. The evidence strongly points to Garry.
